subject: job description
body:
Job description:

 

A global IT position seeking a dynamic individual to work in a
close-knit, private, wealth management firm.  Client services at the
basic desktop level, strong networking and server skills, telecom,
vendor management, contract management, investigating and implementing
new technologies are all the right skills for this candidate to possess.
It should be their aim to create a uniform, predictable technical
environment for people to work in securely and easily.  Additionally,
this unique person must be able to work independently, be a proactive
change maker that reports directly to the senior most of the
organization.  This job will suit the individual that is technical and
creative and does not care for the typical corporate setting.  Vendor
management and contractor management supplements the gaps in this
individual's technical skill i.e. cable contractors, managed network
services, telecom vendors.  While this role may be challenging and
rewarding at the highest levels of an individuals skill set, they still
must be comfortable with desktop support at the most basic level.

 

Other skills:

-highly organized

-documentation for accounts, settings, services, etc.

-project management -large and small projects

-soft skills: client interaction/service, positive and upbeat

-technical experience in a technical setting, BA/BS preferable but not
necessary depending on experience

-roaming between NY locations and flying between US and USVI locations
depending on technical priorities.  

-Striving to configure a remotely supportable infrastructure

 

Technical

Microwave, wireless 802.11 a/b/g/n, Cisco products (APs, switches,
routers), data closets for voice and data, cabling (fiber/copper),
desktops and laptops, standardizing workstation builds, LAN/WAN, Servers
(DCs, Exchange, Citrix, VMware, SQL, DNS, IP accessible data closet
hardware (kvms,upss, surge protectors), Nortel and NEC telco platforms,
tape backups, imaging software (Acronis), security (firewalls, NAT,
VPNs) desktop imaging, blackberries, IPODs, Apple/MACs
body_html:
Job description:

 

A global IT position seeking a dynamic individual to work in a close-knit, private, wealth management firm.  Client services at the basic desktop level, strong networking and server skills, telecom, vendor management, contract management, investigating and implementing new technologies are all the right skills for this candidate to possess.  It should be their aim to create a uniform, predictable technical environment for people to work in securely and easily.  Additionally, this unique person must be able to work independently, be a proactive change maker that reports directly to the senior most of the organization.  This job will suit the individual that is technical and creative and does not care for the typical corporate setting.  Vendor management and contractor management supplements the gaps in this individual’s technical skill i.e. cable contractors, managed network services, telecom vendors.  While this role may be challenging and rewarding at the highest levels of an individuals skill set, they still must be comfortable with desktop support at the most basic level.

 

Other skills:

-highly organized

-documentation for accounts, settings, services, etc.

-project management –large and small projects

-soft skills: client interaction/service, positive and upbeat

-technical experience in a technical setting, BA/BS preferable but not necessary depending on experience

-roaming between NY locations and flying between US and USVI locations depending on technical priorities. 

-Striving to configure a remotely supportable infrastructure

 

Technical

Microwave, wireless 802.11 a/b/g/n, Cisco products (APs, switches, routers), data closets for voice and data, cabling (fiber/copper), desktops and laptops, standardizing workstation builds, LAN/WAN, Servers (DCs, Exchange, Citrix, VMware, SQL, DNS, IP accessible data closet hardware (kvms,upss, surge protectors), Nortel and NEC telco platforms, tape backups, imaging software (Acronis), security (firewalls, NAT, VPNs) desktop imaging, blackberries, IPODs, Apple/MACs
